title: Calson
content:

As ''The DarkStryderCampaign'' takes place four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', Calson must have been [[Death/Legends|dead]] for several years by that point.</ref>

{{Quote|Listen, bud. I'm not the idiot who crowded formation. If you had followed my orders, we wouldn't be down here. And if we're going to get out of the Wilds without some corvaj ripping our livers out, you're going to follow my orders, got it?|Ranna Gorjaye to Calson, after their training patrol crash|<ref name="sc" />}}
'''Calson''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] trainee [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who was under the command of [[Ranna Gorjaye]] at some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During a training patrol over a [[Unidentified planet (Wilds)|planet]], Calson crowded the formation and clipped the wing of Gorjaye's fighter, sending both craft crashing into an area known as the [[Wilds]]. On the ground, Gorjaye ordered him to fall in line and follow her to a nearby [[Unidentified settlement (Ranna Gorjaye)|settlement]], but Calson refused to take orders from a woman. Setting out on his own, he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a [[corvaj]], a predator native to the Wilds.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I'm relieving myself of your command. You're just going to get us killed out here.|Calson to Ranna Gorjaye|<ref name="sc" />}}
[[File:Rannagorjaye.jpg|thumb|right|Ranna Gorjaye, Calson's superior officer]]
Calson was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] junior [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who was part of a training patrol of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] under the command of [[Ranna Gorjaye]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During a flight over a [[Unidentified planet (Wilds)|planet]], Calson crowded the formation, clipping the wing of Gorjaye's fighter with his own [[Starship/Legends|craft]]. The two ships subsequently crash-landed in the [[Wilds]], an area of heavy jungle and swamps inhabited by [[Insect/Legends|insect]] swarms and vicious predators. Before Calson could unstrap himself from his stricken fighter, Gorjaye—who had quickly freed herself from her own stricken fighter—manually opened his [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] and dragged him out. Calson angrily told Gorjaye that he could take care of himself.<ref name="sc" />

Gorjaye gave Calson a verbal dressing down for his actions that had led to the crash, telling him that he had to follow her orders to survive. Calson disagreed, refusing to follow the orders of a woman. Indignant, but aware that Calson was her responsibility as he was her subordinate, Gorjaye used a [[directional transponder]] and a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] map to locate a [[Unidentified settlement (Ranna Gorjaye)|settlement]] seventeen [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] northwest from their current position and suggested that they head out immediately.<ref name="sc" />

Calson, however, had other ideas. During his descent, he had spotted something in the Wilds and planned to investigate. When Gorjaye ordered him to follow her, Calson relieved himself of her command. Taking his survival gear bag, he used his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] to begin clearing a path through the jungle. Shortly after leaving Gorjaye, Calson was ambushed by a [[corvaj]], a predator native to the Wilds, and was [[Death/Legends|killed]].<ref name="sc" /> Gorjaye survived, escaping the Wilds.<ref name="tdc">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I'm not taking orders from some woman.|Calson to Ranna Gorjaye|<ref name="sc" />}}
Calson was a trainee pilot, but he was not a skilled flyer. His overconfidence in his own abilities led directly to the crash-landing in the Wilds, and eventually to his own death. A chauvinist, Calson refused to take orders from women such as Gorjaye, even though she was his superior officer. Ranna Gorjaye considered Calson to be a "rowdy runt."<ref name="sc" />

==Behind the scenes==
Calson first appeared in the short text story ''[[Survival Class]]'', which appeared in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]]. The story served as part of Ranna Gorjaye's backstory.<ref name="sc" />

The planet on which Calson's death occurs is never identified in the text, but Gorjaye's biography states that she received flight training on both the planets [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]] and [[Raithal/Legends|Raithal]],<ref name="tdc" /> indicating that the planet could be either world, although there is no evidence in the story to suggest that this is the case. The only part of the planet mentioned by name is an area known as the Wilds; while the planet [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] is known to have an area called "[[The Wilds (Kiffex)|The Wilds]],"<ref name="legacy 34">[[Legacy (2006) 34|''Legacy'' (2006) 34]]</ref> no source to date has established a link between the two locations.
